## Layer(s) touched

- [ ] Components (`css/components.css`)

## Screenshots

## Checklist
- [ ] Tokens only — no raw hex/px literals.
- [ ] Demoed in `index.html` or a `templates/` file.
- [ ] Docs updated (channel guide and/or copywriting).
- [ ] Skill + compliance checklist updated if behaviour changed.
- [ ] `npm run build` passes; bundle committed.
- [ ] Accessibility: focus rings, reduced-motion, labels, AA contrast.
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under "Unreleased".
